title: rosa sphaeroidea var. malmudariensis
intro: Rosa sphaeroidea var. malmudariensis, also known as the Chinese rose or Rosa malmudarica, is a plant species native to China, classified as a variety of the Rosa sphaeroidea species. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Rosa sphaeroidea var. malmudariensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and support respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Rosa sphaeroidea var. malmudariensis is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, or dried and used in herbal infusions or decoctions.
